/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sokol_corner_radius.dir/main.c.o -o sokol_corner_radius  ../sokol-video-demo/libsokol.a -framework QuartzCore -framework Cocoa -framework MetalKit -framework Metal
